chapter_title.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ الْإِمَامَ مَتَى يَعْلَمُ أَنَّ الْأَمْرَ قَدْ صَارَ إِلَيْهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 90 – Regarding the Imam<sup>asws</sup>, when does he<sup>asws</sup> know that the command has come to him<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/240)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/240)
text: رَأَيْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ عَلِيَّ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ فِي الْيَوْمِ الَّذِي تُوُفِّيَ فِيهِ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَ إِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ مَضَى أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَقِيلَ لَهُ وَ كَيْفَ عَرَفْتَ قَالَ لِأَنَّهُ تُدَاخِلُنِي ذِلَّةٌ لِلَّهِ لَمْ أَكُنْ أَعْرِفُهَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Abu Al Fazal Al Shahbany, from Haroun Bin Al Fazl who said,

‘I saw Abu Al-Hassan Ali Bin Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> (10<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) during the day in which Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> (9<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) passed away, and he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘We are for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and to Him<sup>azwj</sup> we are returning’. Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> has passed away’. So it was said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘And how did you<sup>asws</sup> know that?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Because such humbleness to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> entered into me<sup>asws</sup> which I<sup>asws</sup> had not recognised it (beforehand)’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from abu al-Fadl al-Shahbani from Harun ibn al-Fadl who has said the following. “I saw abu al-Hassan Ali ibn Muhammad on the day abu Ja‘far (a.s.) passed away. He said, “To Allah we belong and to Him we return. Abu Ja‘far (a.s.) passed away.” He was asked, “How do you know that he passed away?” He said, “A form of humbleness before Allah that I had never experienced overwhelmed me.”
